Name: FFG Austrian Research Promotion Agency
Description:
The Austrian Research Promotion Agency (FFG) is the national funding institution for applied research and development in Austria.

We offer a comprehensive range of services for Austrian enterprises, research institutions and researchers – from the management of public funding programmes to consulting services in all phases of technology development and innovation, from support for integration into European research programmes and networks to the promotion of Austria"s interests at the European and the international level.

Name: NHAI InvIT (National Highways Infra Trust)
Description:
National Highways Infra Trust ("Trust") was settled on October 19, 2020, in New Delhi pursuant to the Trust Deed as a contributory irrevocable trust in accordance with the Indian Trusts Act, 1882. The Trust was registered with SEBI on October 28, 2020, under Regulation 3(1) of the InvIT Regulations and has obtained a certificate of registration from SEBI bearing number IN/InvIT/20-21/0014.  The Trust is an infrastructure investment trust established for making investments in special purpose vehicles as defined under Regulation 2(1)(zy) of the InvIT Regulations, or infrastructure projects or securities of Indian companies engaged in the infrastructure sector, as may be permitted in terms of Regulation 18(5) of the InvIT Regulations.

IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited is the Trustee to the Trust.

National Highways Infra Investment Managers Private Limited was incorporated as a private limited company on July 25, 2020, under the Companies Act, 2013. NHIIMPL is a wholly-owned subsidiary of NHAI.  NHIIMPL has been appointed as the Investment Manager to the NHAI InvIT by IDBI Trusteeship Services Ltd; the trustee to NHAI InvIT and is responsible for managing the operations of InvIT in accordance with InvIT regulations.

National Highways InvIT Project Managers Private Limited (NHIPMPL) has been incorporated on 9th of March, 2021 under the Companies Act, 2013.  NHIPMPL is proposed to be appointed as Project Manager of NHAI InvIT in terms of the InvIT regulations.  The Project Manager undertake operations and management of the NHAI InvIT, including making arrangements for the maintenance of assets held under the NHAI InvIT.  The Project Manager has entered into the Project Implementation and Management Agreement, in terms of the InvIT Regulations.

Name: ISPT
Description:
ISPT is a wholly owned subsidiary of IFM Investors.

ISPT’s LinkedIn page is moderated in accordance with LinkedIn’s professional community policies. Any content that is deemed not to align with these policies will be removed and/or reported. More info: https://www.linkedin.com/legal/professional-community-policies

Name: Kulturstiftung des Bundes (German Federal Cultural Foundation)
Description: The German Federal Cultural Foundation promotes art and culture within the scope of federal competence. One of its main priorities is to support innovative programmes and projects on an international level. It is a civil-law foundation and has its headquarters in Halle an der Saale, Germany. The German Federal Cultural Foundation is financed by the Federal Government Commissioner for Culture and the Media.

Name: EEP Africa
Description:
The Energy and Environment Partnership Trust Fund (EEP Africa) is a multi-donor fund providing early-stage financing to innovative clean energy projects, technologies and business models in Southern and Eastern Africa.

EEP Africa is hosted and managed by the Nordic Development Fund (NDF) with funding from Austria, Denmark, Finland, Iceland, NDF, Norway and Switzerland.

Name: VolkswagenStiftung
Description:
Die gemeinnützige VolkswagenStiftung mit Sitz in Hannover ist mit 3,4 Milliarden Euro Stiftungskapital und einem Fördervolumen von insgesamt etwa 150 Millionen Euro pro Jahr die größte private Wissenschaftsförderin in Deutschland und eine der größten Stiftungen in Europa. Sie wurde 1961 von der Bundesrepublik Deutschland und dem Land Niedersachsen gegründet. Trotz ihres Namens handelt es sich nicht um eine Unternehmensstiftung, die Stiftungsgremien sind autonom und unabhängig in ihren Entscheidungen.

Impulse für die Wissenschaft

Mit rund 100 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern fördern wir Wissenschaft und Technik in Forschung und Lehre. Wir ermöglichen Forschungsvorhaben in zukunftsträchtigen Gebieten und greifen unsere Förderschwerpunkte auch in unserem Veranstaltungsangebot thematisch auf. 
Besondere Aufmerksamkeit widmen wir dem wissenschaftlichen Nachwuchs sowie der Zusammenarbeit von Forscherinnen und Forschern auch über wissenschaftliche, kulturelle und nationale Grenzen hinaus. Und wir unterstützen wissenschaftliche Institutionen in Deutschland dabei, die strukturellen Voraussetzungen für ihre Arbeit zu verbessern. Seit 1962 haben wir etwa 33.000 Projekte mit 5,5 Milliarden Euro unterstützt.

Stiften Sie Wissen - mit uns

Bei Stellenausschreibungen sucht die VolkswagenStiftung Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter mit hoher fachlicher Kompetenz, einem ausgeprägten Teamgeist und starker Gemeinwohlorientierung. Ob in den Abteilungen Förderung, Vermögensanlage, Finanzen und Verwaltung oder in den Stabsreferaten des Generalsekretärs - bringen Sie Ihre Ideen bei uns ein und lassen Sie uns gemeinsam Wissenschaft voranbringen – in Deutschland und in der Welt.

Impressum: https://www.volkswagenstiftung.de/impressum

Name: Dieter Schwarz Foundation
Description:
The Dieter Schwarz Foundation ranks among the large German foundations; it becomes active where government bodies are not, or not sufficiently, able to meet the needs of the economy and society.

'Promote education, share knowledge, venture future' is the guiding principle of the Dieter Schwarz Foundation, named after Heilbronn entrepreneur Dieter Schwarz. The foundation is based in Heilbronn, where it has been active in the region and far beyond since 1999. Through its commitments, the Foundation today strives to promote that which makes society well-prepared for the future: a wide range of educational opportunities for people in different phases of life. Science is of decisive importance for the development and future sustainability of the state. Against this backdrop, one of the main objectives of the foundation is to recognize potential, to develop visions from it and to implement them sustainably.

Current focal points include the Bildungscampus in Heilbronn and the Science Center experimenta, which is also located in Heilbronn, and at which visitors can experience the world of science with all of their senses as well as get to grips interactively with the natural sciences and technology.

Name: Anglo American Foundation
Description: Championing youth for a green and fair future.

Name: Migros Pioneer Fund
Description: Those trying to change the world will meet resistance. But progress is achieved when people challenge deeply ingrained structures with courageous ideas and drive. The Migros Pioneer Fund promotes this courage – to ensure that bold ideas turn into tangible solutions, with a view to promoting a better society.

Name: Fonds 21
Description:
Fonds 21 is een ondernemend en maatschappelijk betrokken fonds dat ideële doelen steunt op gebied van Kunst & Cultuur, Jongeren & Maatschappij en Kunst & Educatie. Hiermee wil het fonds een positieve bijdrage leveren aan de samenleving van nu. Het donatiebudget van €11,5 miljoen per jaar wordt beschikbaar gesteld door Stichting Beheer SNS REAAL. Organisaties kunnen bij ons een aanvraag indienen voor een financiële ondersteuning vanaf € 10.000. 
 
Fonds 21 ondersteunt professionele, kwalitatief sterke projecten die een breed, nieuw publiek weten te bereiken. Naast financier, zijn wij daarbij ook een betrokken partner en adviseur, met scherp zicht op de kansen en uitdagingen van nu. Met wisselende programmaregelingen springen wij in op actuele thema’s die een nieuwe en waardevolle impuls geven aan de verschillende sectoren. 
 
Nieuwsgierig naar welke projecten wij steunen en waarom? Ga naar www.fonds21.nl 
Een aanvraag indienen? Lees eerst de algemene voorwaarden goed door.

Name: Sai Sudha Deva Trust (SSDT)
Description:
Donate To Our Mission of Compassion 

Each month, a small act of kindness can bring hope to lives burdened by silence and struggle. Sai Sudha Deva Trust is committed to spiritual, social, and educational upliftment. Our focus includes temple construction, charitable support, and aid for underprivileged and EWS families - especially the Brahmin community, Forward Castes (FC), middle-class families, and the tax-paying community.

We aim to preserve culture, promote education, and serve humanity with devotion and compassion.

We welcome monthly donors of ₹500 / ₹5000 / ₹10000 to help us sustain and expand our work in:

* Education for underprivileged students
* Empowering women and single mothers
* Spiritual and temple community welfare
* Self-sustaining family initiatives
* Free daily meals and nutrition
* Miyawaki forests and environmental care
* Medical emergency assistance
* Support for soldier families and martyrs
* Marriage assistance for the needy
* Senior citizen care
* Orphan and disability support
* Rural development and skill-building programs

Together, we can uplift lives with dignity and purpose.

GPay: 9362439124 Devarajan N.R (NRD)

A/C Name: SAI SUDHA DEVA TRUST
A/C No: 23280200005800
IFSC: FDRL0002328
Bank: Federal Bank

Let your monthly support become someone’s lifeline.

#SaiSudhaDevaTrust #HelpingHelps #GiveMonthly #TransformLives #SocialImpact #IndiaCares #SustainableChange #OneNationOneHeart

Name: Margot Friedländer Stiftung
Description: Die Margot Friedländer Stiftung ist eine Stiftung für die Zukunft der Erinnerung. Sie führt das Lebenswerk von Margot Friedländer fort in einer Zukunft ohne Zeitzeugen. Ab 2024 wird die Stiftung den Margot-Friedländer-Preis verleihen. Dieser Preis zeichnet junge und erwachsene Menschen für ihr vorbildliches Engagement für Menschlichkeit, Toleranz, Freiheit und Demokratie aus – zum Beispiel in Schulen, an Hochschulen, in Elterninitiativen, Vereinen, Betrieben oder Bürgerinitiativen.

Name: Landsbyggefonden
Description:
Landsbyggefonden is an independent institution formed by housing bodies and established by law.

Landsbyggefonden carries out among other management of the basic capital for publicly supported housing and administration of the social housing sector of the duty of contributions and collection of payments for land disposal fund, etc. Moreover, conducting fund analysis tasks, the specific operating support for the renovation, etc. and a guarantee expenses etc.

Name: SRH
Description:
SRH is a leading provider of education and healthcare services with 14,500 employees.

At our UNIVERSITIES, we prepare students for careers with future-oriented study programs, innovative teaching concepts and state-of-the-art conditions for studying. The total of 9 universities offer a broad spectrum of more than 100 courses of study for currently 13,000 students. At the SRH universities, students learn in a purposeful and independent manner according to the specially developed study concept CORE (Competence Oriented Research and Education). In compact scientifically and practice-based thematic units the students are qualified for professional life by activating teaching as well as competence-oriented exams.

In our SCHOOLS and VOCATIONAL SCHOOLS we support our customers on their way to successful school or vocational qualifications. In our PROFESSIONAL REHABILITATION CENTERS, we support by nursing, therapy or career guidance, training / retraining and professional development. We offer ideal learning conditions, individual support and develop training courses that are geared to the needs of companies and society.

At the SRH CLINICS we tend to 1 million patients each year, in our ten acute care hospitals, six rehabilitation clinics and medical care centers with sites in Baden-Württemberg, Thuringia, Saxony and Saxony-Anhalt. Sustainable investments in medical technology and buildings ensure high quality medical care and patient safety. Regular training of our more than 9,000 employees ensures the quality of treatment and leads to greater patient comfort.

In our SERVICE COMPANIES dedicated teams provide high service quality day after day in the areas of catering, cleaning, building management, IT and hotel with conference center. Our employees take care of their customers and attractive products in a reliable and responsible manner.

Name: The Access to Justice Foundation
Description:
Every year across the UK, millions of people will need legal advice to help them with issues like housing, employment, immigration and domestic abuse. But they won’t get the support they need - because they can’t afford it or they don’t know where to turn. 

The Access to Justice Foundation is the only funder dedicated to increasing free legal support, advice and representation across the UK. We work with other funders and individuals to increase the money available for free legal advice, and we work with community organisations across England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland to ensure people facing a legal problem get the help they need.

We’re independent and evidence-based, and we use our unique position to bring people together and influence the wider systems affecting people’s access to justice. By supporting us, you’re ensuring your support goes to communities and people where it’s needed most and helping shape a society where everyone gets a fair chance.

Name: European Climate Initiative (EUKI)
Description:
We are the European Climate Initiative (EUKI) – a programme of the German Federal Ministry for Environment, Climate Action, Nature Conservation and Nuclear Safety. We finance and support climate action projects across Europe, with a focus on eastern and south-eastern Europe.
 
𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝘄𝗲 𝗱𝗼
 Support for climate action projects: We help organisations turn their ideas into reality.
 Networking: We connect experts, organisations, and decision-makers.
 Training: We offer trainings and workshops to help your climate project prosper.
  Visibility: We give visibility to climate action projects.
 
𝗔𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 & 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗻𝗲𝘀
 Over 232 supported projects in Europe
 Over 145 EUKI Academy Events held with more than 6.400 participants
 A Community with more than 459 organisations all over Europe
 
𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗩𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻
We contribute to the EU climate targets. The EU aims to become climate neutral by 2050 and to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by at least 55 percent by 2030 compared with 1990 levels. With the European Green Deal, the EU has created a long-term strategy for achieving these targets. Fit for 55 and REPowerEU provide roadmaps for the transition to a climate-neutral society and a more sustainable energy system. 
 
In order to achieve that, we support climate action projects working in these fields: Climate-Neutral Mobility, Climate Policy, Carbon Removals and Sinks, Energy Transition and Climate-Neutral Buildings, Just Transition and Sustainable Economy. 
 
Let’s connect! Are you part of a climate project or would you like to learn more? Connect with us and find out how we can support you! 

 Find out more on our website: euki.de/en/
 Reach out to us directly: info@euki.de

Name: The RISA Fund
Description:
The Research and Innovation Systems for Africa (RISA) Fund is a multi-country programme supporting research & innovation systems in Africa. The project
is funded by UK International Development from the UK Government . It is operating in 6 Sub-Saharan African counties, namely: Ethiopia, Ghana, Kenya, Nigeria, Rwanda and South Africa. The project will run until March 2026. 

NB: The material presented here has been funded by UK International Development from the UK government; however, the views expressed do not necessarily reflect the UK government’s official policies.

Name: Kuehne Climate Center
Description: We develop and implement logistics-focused solutions to accelerate the transition to a just, low-carbon society by reducing emissions, removing carbon, and strengthening resilience. We work globally towards decoupling growth in prosperity from greenhouse gas emissions, particularly in low- and middle-income countries. Our ultimate goal is to achieve sustainable trade and development.

Name: Pagestreet
Description:
Pagestreet helps companies across Europe unlock their full potential with deep expertise in R&D funding, energy efficiency and compliance.For more than 12 years, we have supported over 3,000 organizations in turning complex requirements into practical solutions and sustainable growth.

Our approach combines structured consulting, collaborative partnership and lasting impact. With an interdisciplinary team of experts, we are redefining funding to be efficient, transparent and results-driven.

We assist mid-sized and large companies in obtaining significant grants and tax incentives in the fields of research and development, energy and manufacturing facilities.We also support selected clients in energy efficiency, from audits and planning to implementation. A range of digital services, including funding management, privacy and web solutions, completes our portfolio.

Pagestreet stands for next-generation funding consulting, data-driven, digital and future-oriented for organizations that see innovation, energy and compliance as true drivers of progress.

Name: Stiftung Landesbank Baden-Württemberg
Description: Junge Menschen in ihrer beruflichen und sozialen Entwicklung unterstützen, die heimische Tier- und Pflanzenwelt erhalten, Kunst und Kultur in Baden-Württemberg fördern – das sind die Anliegen der rechtlich selbstständigen und gemeinnützigen Stiftung Landesbank Baden-Württemberg, kurz: LBBW-Stiftung.

Name: Perennial Partners
Description:
Perennial Partners is a house of specialist investment teams. We partner with outstanding investment people pursuing great investment outcomes in segments where active management can add meaningful value.

Uncovering great investment opportunities requires talent and focus. Perennial Partners has built a reputation for investment excellence by creating a family of highly qualified investment teams.  

We provide our investment partners with strategic, operational and distribution expertise and access to an investor base made up of financial advisers, wealth managers, institutional, high net worth and family offices, while allowing them to focus on managing money.

Our ‘clients first’ culture underpins everything we do.

At Perennial Partners we believe in true alignment, our business and investment partners are wholly owned by executives and we co-invest in our strategies alongside our clients and on the same terms. This means that we have true ‘skin in the game’, creating a powerful alignment of interests with our clients. 

Perennial Partners Limited Corporate Authorised Representative No. 1293138 of Perennial Value Management Limited AFSL 247293.

Name: TrustQore
Description:
Established in Switzerland in 2000, TrustQore is an independent trust and fiduciary business with offices in Switzerland, Mauritius, UAE, British Virgin Islands, United Kingdom and south Africa.

TrustQore became independent in 2022 following an owner-manager buyout in January 2022. Prior to that TrustQore was part of a wider asset management and multi-family office business based in Switzerland.

The importance of our origins is acknowledged through our tag line and the use of the word “Suisse”. Our history has led us to today and our journey is representative of that followed by our clients.

We understand the uncertainties of life and the recognise the need to constantly evolve to face its challenges and deliver value to our them.

Today, TrustQore has 96 professionals (to include a number of experienced lawyers, qualified accountants, STEP qualified individuals and tax advisers) based in 4 jurisdictions who are supported by a global network of “best friend” service providers. This approach enables us to deliver value driven global wealth solutions for international families, corporates and entrepreneurs backed by a vast amount of experience and expertise.

Differentiation
“Quality means doing it right when no one is looking” – Henry Ford

We believe that quality and value should not be in binary opposition to each other. Leveraging our experience and expertise and our internal group structure, we believe we are unique in offering both.
Our internal group structure enables trust administration to be undertaken in a cost efficient manner in the jurisdiction which is most appropriate to deliver a client’s objectives. We have achieved this by implementing a seamless and efficient internal process which enables work to be placed with the appropriately experienced individual at the correct price level. This avoids the situation where clients pay for more expensive resources to undertake routine tasks at a higher charge out rate or in a more expensive jurisdictions.

Name: DFL Stiftung
Description:
Established on the initiative of the DFL Deutsche Fußball Liga e.V. and the DFL GmbH, the DFL Foundation is an umbrella organisation for the various social activities of the 36 clubs and corporations of the Bundesliga and Bundesliga 2 since its founding in 2008. Focused on Germany as a whole, it complements and links the mostly regional commitments of clubs and players. It is specifically involved where football can use its connective power in the best interest of society.

The DFL Foundation is a foundation created from professional football for society. Its aims are integration and participation and therefore equality regardless of background, culture or disability. It is also concerned with providing an active and healthy childhood for children and teenagers. The DFL Foundation is also a foundation created from professional football for German top-level sport. It supports young talent for 50 different Olympic and Paralympic sports. Under the motto "Chancen schaffen" (Creating chances), the DFL Foundation has supported over 462 projects with a total volume in excess of €16,7 million. Ambassadors for the DFL Foundation are Manuel Neuer (FC Bayern München), Naldo (FC Schalke 04) and Markus Rehm (longjumper and Paralympic gold medalist), who help draw attention to important social challenges.

The Foundation focuses primarily on developing its lighthouse projects "Welcome to football", "Classroom stadium", "Football meets culture", the online travel guide "Barrier-free to the stadium", and "Youth elite patronage" of German Sports Aid. Third-party initiatives that match the Foundation's own objectives are also supported. Over 36,000 – mostly children and young people – benefit directly every year from the DFL Foundation projects.

Name: Droom en Daad
Description: Droom en Daad draagt sinds 2016 bij aan de kunst en cultuur in Rotterdam. We ontwikkelen nieuwe culturele projecten en stimuleren initiatieven die de creativitiet, diversiteit en geschiedenis van de stad weerspiegelen.

Name: AYCE Capital
Description:
AYCE Capital acquires and partners with high-performing and successful MSP managers to drive organic growth and take service delivery to its next maturity level. Most importantly, we partner with Managed Service Providers that prioritize quality service, customer satisfaction, and employee well-being.

To business owners, we guarantee to respect your time with honest and clear communication. Continuing your success means respecting your history, valuing your employees, and listening to your customers. Our goal is to strengthen companies in the long-term through sustained investment and long-term vision.

AYCE Capital draws from our resources and experience in Tech Sales, Marketing, Accounting, and Growth Strategy Execution to continue growing businesses with impressive track-records.

Name: Nebula Fund
Description: We’re Nebula. A Fund to expand narrative power. We support progressive movements advancing gender justice and fighting for LGBTQI+ rights. We provide them with the core funding and resources they need to mobilize their communities effectively and shift public sentiment. Together, we are working toward a shared vision of a world where everyone, everywhere feels safe, has the freedom to be themselves, and can live with dignity and autonomy.

Name: Stiftung Bühl
Description: Die Stiftung Bühl setzt sich dafür ein, dass Kinder und Jugendliche mit geistiger Behinderung oder Lernbehinderung ein möglichst selbstbestimmtes Leben führen, sich beruflich und sozial integrieren und an der Gesellschaft teilhaben können. Wir ermöglichen ihnen, Lernerfahrungen zu sammeln und erarbeiten mit ihnen gemeinsam ein Bewusstsein für Möglichkeiten und Grenzen. Sie lernen bei uns „mehr können“ und wir unterstützen sie dabei, ihr Potenzial auszuschöpfen. Dafür engagieren wir uns mit Fachkompetenz und Herzblut.

Name: Wübben Stiftung Bildung
Description: Die 2013 gegründete Wübben Stiftung Bildung ist eine private Bildungsstiftung mit Sitz in Düsseldorf. Ihre Vision ist es, dass alle Kinder und Jugendlichen unabhängig von ihrer Herkunft gerechte Bildungschancen erhalten. Dafür ist ein Bildungssystem notwendig, das genau das besser gewährleisten kann. Um dieser Vision näher zu kommen, berät, begleitet und unterstützt die Wübben Stiftung Bildung Akteure des Bildungssystems bei der Weiterentwicklung von Schulen im Brennpunkt. Dazu setzt sie operative Programme mit Ländern und Kommunen um, gibt mit ihrer wissenschaftlichen Einheit, dem impaktlab, auf Basis wissenschaftlicher Analysen und praktischer Erkenntnisse Impulse in das Bildungssystem und fördert im kleinen Umfang ausgewählte Projekte, um daraus zu lernen.

Name: STIFTUNG INITIATIVE MEHRWEG
Description: Unser Ziel ist es Ressourcenschonung und Umweltschutz nachhaltig zu unterstützen. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, Voraussetzungen zu schaffen, um Mehrweganteile in allen wirtschaftlichen Bereichen nachhaltig zu stabilisieren und zu erhöhen. In Zusammenarbeit mit Umwelt- und Handelsverbänden sowie mehrwegorientierten Unternehmen vertiefen wir jedes Jahr einzelne Themenschwerpunkte und bringen Forderungen zur Mehrwegförderung in den umweltpolitischen Dialog ein.

Name: Lighthouse Collective Capital
Description:
Lighthouse Capital is a multi-manager, multi-strategy digital asset hedge fund operating under the legal entity Lighthouse Collective Capital.

We combine institutional-grade infrastructure with the agility of digital asset innovation to deliver diversified, uncorrelated, and risk-adjusted returns across crypto markets.

Lighthouse Capital empowers exceptional portfolio managers with capital, technology, and centralized risk management, while maintaining the operational excellence and governance institutional investors demand.

Name: Media Forward Fund
Description: The Media Forward Fund is the first transnational fund for the support of journalism in Germany, Austria and Switzerland. The fund is committed to ensuring that there is more independent quality journalism with viable business models that publish strong, trustworthy content and are sustainably financed in the long term. Particular attention is paid to target groups that have had little access to journalism to date.

Name: AssetClassic
Description:
Passionate about classic cars, driven by financial results.

AssetClassic is an investment and experience vehicle formed to facilitate privileged access to private and institutional investors to the classic car asset class.

Classic cars have historically been one of the best performing alternative asset classes, however marked by high entry barriers. AssetClassic removes these for its members, while offering exclusive curated automotive and networking experiences.

Name: Karl Schlecht Stiftung
Description:
Die Karl Schlecht Stiftung ist eine gemeinnützige Stiftung mit Fokus auf "Good Leadership". Ihre Leitidee ist die Verbesserung von Führung in Business und Gesellschaft durch humanistische Werte. Vor diesem Hintergrund fördert sie die ganzheitliche, werteorientierte Persönlichkeitsentwicklung von jungen Menschen und angehenden Führungskräften. Dazu unterstützt sie wirkungsorientierte Projekte und Institutionen in den fünf Themenfeldern "Ethik", "Leadership", "Entrepreneurship", "Kultur" und "Technik".

Vorstand: 
Dr. Katrin Schlecht (Vorsitzende) 
Dr. Philipp B. Bocks
Dr. Uwe Dyk 

Zuständige Stiftungsaufsichtsbehörde: Regierungspräsidium Stuttgart 

Die Karl Schlecht Stiftung ist eine Stiftung privaten Rechts und als gemeinnützige wissenschaftsfördernde Einrichtung nach § 5 Absatz 1 Nr. 9 KStG steuerbefreit. 

Impressum: www.karlschlechtstiftung.de/meta/impressum 
V.i.S.d.P.: Dr. Katrin Schlecht 

Nutzungsbedingungen/Copyright: Die Nutzungs- und Verwertungsrechte der hier bereitgestellten Bilder liegen bei der Karl Schlecht Stiftung. Dritten werden die Bilder – ausschließlich im Rahmen redaktioneller, wissenschaftlicher oder privater Zwecke – kostenfrei zur Verfügung gestellt. Dieses schließt unter anderem eine werbliche Nutzung oder eine Bildvermarktung aus. Bei Veröffentlichung ist eine Quellangabe erforderlich. Name: Octopus Renewables Infrastructure Trust (ORIT)
Description:
Octopus Renewables Infrastructure Trust plc (ORIT) is an investment company focused on providing investors with an attractive and sustainable level of income returns, with an element of capital growth, by investing in a diversified portfolio of Renewable Energy Assets in Europe and Australia. ORIT is listed on the premium segment of the main market of the London Stock Exchange. 

ORIT is managed by Octopus Energy Generation, part of Octopus Energy Group, driving the renewable energy agenda by building green power for the future.

Name: Deutsche Bahn Stiftung
Description:
Die Deutsche Bahn Stiftung wurde 2013 als gemeinnützige GmbH der Deutschen Bahn AG gegründet und ist deutschlandweit in den Schwerpunkten Bildung, Integration und Ehrenamt aktiv. 

Ziel der Stiftung ist es, den gesellschaftlichen Zusammenhalt zu stärken. Sie ist in Bereichen tätig, die fundamental für eine funktionierende Gesellschaft sind. Wir möchten Kinder und Jugendliche besonders aus sozioökonomisch benachteiligten Verhältnissen für das Leben stark machen. Außerdem leisten wir Hilfe für Menschen, die von Armut und Obdachlosigkeit betroffen sind und arbeiten dazu u.a. eng mit den Bahnhofsmissionen zusammen. Auch International hilft die Stiftung in humanitären Notlagen wie nach Katastrophen. 

Mit dem DB Museum (www.dbmuseum.de) gehört zudem das weltweit älteste Eisenbahnmuseum zur Stiftung. Mit seinem umfangreichen Angebot und einer Fülle an Exponaten hält es die Eisenbahngeschichte lebendig und stärkt den Bildungsschwerpunkt der Stiftung.

Name: Yieldfund
Description:
Yieldfund is a Dutch quantitative trading company that operates fully automated, using mathematical models and real-time market analysis.
As an investor with Yieldfund, you can participate without any prior market knowledge. Getting started is possible with a one-time investment from €10,000.

Depending on your chosen investment plan (1, 2, or 3 years), you can benefit from annual returns of up to 60%. At the end of the selected investment term, you will receive 100% repayment of your initial investment.

At Yieldfund, investors enjoy above-market, stable returns in a simple and accessible way—with weekly payouts. This means Yieldfund pays out your returns to your personal wallet every Monday.

Yieldfund is transforming crypto investing for both beginners and experienced investors.
When you invest with Yieldfund, there's no need to trade actively yourself. Instead, you benefit from the profits generated by Yieldfund’s advanced trading algorithm, which does all the work for you. Yieldfund’s technology takes care of everything, allowing individual investors to take advantage of a sophisticated quantitative trading system without lifting a finger. No guesswork. Just consistent, data-driven results

Name: Ardh Sainik Group
Description: Since 2015, the Ardh Sainik Group has been committed to the rehabilitation and welfare of the soldier community and their families through reduced rates for children to attend school and college, ITR e-filing assistance, free legal advice, Ardh Sainik Canteen (ASC) grocery stores, Ardh Sainik Pharmacy Stores, and various other employment opportunities to lead fulfilling lives.

Name: QEST — Investing in the Future of Craft
Description:
QEST, the Queen Elizabeth Scholarship Trust, transforms the careers of talented and aspiring craftspeople by funding their training and education at pivotal moments in their craft journeys to excellence. Founded by the Royal Warrant Holders Association in 1990, the charity has awarded £6.5 million to some 800 makers working across the UK in a broad range of traditional and contemporary craft skills.  

HM The King is the charity’s Patron.

Regularly receiving over 450 applications per year for its Scholarship, Emerging Maker and Apprenticeship Programmes, QEST awards around 60 individual grants per year, around £500,000. In 2023, across all its programmes, the charity gave away a total of £731,000, the largest amount in any one year since its inception. Our aspiration is to increase our giving to £1 million + by 2025/26.

Partnerships are key to QEST’s development, enabling the charity to broaden its impact and develop a diverse pipeline of creative and craft talent, strengthening the UK’s craft sector. 

In November 2022 we launched a partnership with the National Saturday Club to create Craft&Making Clubs for 13–16-year-olds across the UK, many from disadvantaged and under-represented communities. In Autumn 2023, we launched two further programmes and charity partnerships; Know-How Craft Studio with Intoart – a pioneering visual arts organisation for people with learning disabilities; and Making the Future with Education and Employers, raising awareness of the opportunities to study and work in craft and making amongst secondary school children, teachers and parents.

Name: Alfried Krupp von Bohlen und Halbach-Stiftung
Description:
The non-profit Alfried Krupp von Bohlen und Halbach-Stiftung has been supporting people and projects in science, education, health services, sport, literature, music and fine art since 1968. It has invested 680 million Euros since its establishment at its headquarters in Essen, throughout Germany and internationally. As the biggest shareholder in thyssenkrupp AG and in accordance with the will of its founder, the object of the Stiftung is to use the revenue deriving from its assets exclusively and directly to serve the common good. Through its work it sets priorities in science and university development, aims to enable equal opportunities, contributes to international understanding and improves the education of younger generations. The Stiftung owns the Villa Hügel with its park and the Historisches Archiv Krupp, which are accessible to the public. 

Photography is a main topic of the Alfried Krupp von Bohlen und Halbach-Stiftung: For years it has supported artists and curators with scholarships and enabled the acquisition of collections for museums - and finally the Historisches Archiv Krupp holds over 2.5 million photographs on industrial history. In the field of education, the Stiftung aims to give young people the chance to develop their own skills at an early age: More than 1.300 pupils from Essen have already had the opportunity to plan their future careers with the help of internships abroad. Promoting young talent is also part of the sponsorship program: The Alfried Krupp-Förderpreis, endowed with 1 million Euros, enables young professors to advance their work independently. The Stiftung's own Alfried Krupp Krankenhaus at two locations in Essen offers excellent medical and nursing care. Events such as the "Salon am Hügel" address current social issues, for example the influence of Instagram on photographic art.

https://www.instagram.com/kruppstiftung/ 
https://www.krupp-stiftung.de/impressum/ 
https://www.krupp-stiftung.de/datenschutz/

Name: Berthold Leibinger Stiftung GmbH
Description: Since 1992, the Berthold Leibinger Stiftung has supported cultural, scientific, religious and community organizations and projects from the earnings of its foundation assets. The commitment of the individual and the will to accept responsibility are fundamental for the future development of our society. The purpose of the Berthold Leibinger Stiftung as a non-profit GmbH is to do its part through the activities it sponsors.

Name: Grupo FEISA
Description:
Somos una organización creada hace 53 años en la ciudad de Bogotá por un grupo de empleados que se unieron para crear un FONDO en el cual pudieran ahorrar y hacer realidad sus sueños.

FEISA se ha constituido a través de los años en uno de los fondos de empleados más grandes del país, enfocado en brindar a sus asociados y familia, soluciones acordes a las necesidades, acompañamiento en la realización de sus sueños y en mejorar su calidad de vida.

Name: ATIF | Africa Transformation and Industrialization Fund
Description:
The Africa Transformation and Industrialization Fund (ATIF) is an investment company that aims to bring solutions to the problems hampering African development. To do so it will invest, alone or with co-investors, in assets supporting the continent’s industrialization and economic development, while keeping a strong commitment to environmental and social sustainability.

ATIF was founded in 2021 with the ambition to proactively participate in the sustainable industrialization of Africa by investing in integrated and sustainable industrial ecosystems across the continent.

The fund capitalizes on its seasoned team’s long-standing experience in implementing industrial projects and conducting transactions in Africa to generate maximum impact for the continent and create value for its partners.

Name: Greencoat UK Wind PLC
Description:
Greencoat UK Wind PLC is the leading listed renewable infrastructure fund, invested in UK wind farms. The Company's aim is to provide investors with an annual dividend that increases in line with RPI inflation while preserving the capital value of its investment portfolio in the long term on a real basis through reinvestment of excess cash flow.

The Company provides investors with the opportunity to participate directly in the ownership of UK wind farms, so increasing the resources and capital dedicated to the deployment of renewable energy and the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions.

Name: Tim Fairfax Family Foundation
Description:
The Tim Fairfax Family Foundation (TFFF) exists to provide support to rural, regional, and remote communities in Queensland and the Northern Territory, who face particular challenges stemming from their geographical isolation. 

The TFFF values connectedness, resilience, futureproofing and leadership efforts, and supports organisations, initiatives, and endeavours which strive to cultivate and reinforce these qualities within our communities. 

We focus on organisations and initiatives that are locally driven, encourage diversity, strengthen community, and involve collaboration between both private and public sector partners.

Name: Max Weber Stiftung
Description: Die Max Weber Stiftung (MWS) ist eine öffentlich-rechtliche Stiftung mit Sitz in Bonn. Sie zählt zu den maßgeblichen Trägern deutscher geistes- und sozialwissenschaftlicher Forschung im Ausland. Die MWS unterhält weltweit elf wissenschaftlich autonome Institute sowie weitere Außenstellen, die eine Brückenfunktion zwischen den Gastländern und Deutschland einnehmen und eine wichtige Rolle in der internationalen Wissenschaftslandschaft spielen.

Name: The Mitigation Action Facility
Description:
𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗔𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

The 𝗠𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗴𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗔𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗙𝗮𝗰𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 is a global initiative and multi-donor fund with a clear mission: to spark deep, lasting change where it matters most – in 𝗲𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗴𝘆, 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁, and 𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘆. 

These are the engines of every economy. And the battlegrounds for a decarbonised future. 

At MAF, we work with bold thinkers and doers in developing countries and emerging economies. Projects that not only reduce carbon but also create opportunities, shift policies and rewrite what’s possible. Projects that lay the groundwork for lasting, systemic change. 

 Here’s how we do it

Each year, we invite countries eligible for Official Development Assistance (ODA) to apply through our open 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁𝘀. It’s a competitive process — but for good reason. Selected initiatives receive:

Technical support to strengthen institutions and shape smart policies
 Innovative finance that unlocks bigger investments and bolder solutions
 Support every step of the way – from early ideas to full-scale deployment

Through our grants we support climate solutions from concept to implementation. Our “4D” model says it all: 𝐃𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐩. 𝐃𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞. 𝐃𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐨𝐲. 𝐃𝐞𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐛𝐨𝐧𝐢𝐬𝐞.

 Why it matters

We’re building on more than a decade of experience – continuing the legacy of the NAMA Facility (2013-2022). So far, we've:

 Backed over 𝟲𝟬 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁𝘀
 Supported work in 𝟯𝟴 𝗰𝗼𝘂𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀
 Collaborated with 𝟰𝟴𝟳 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿 𝗶𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗶𝘁𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀
 Helped shape 𝟰𝟲 𝗸𝗲𝘆 𝗽𝗼𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗲𝘀

And with 𝗘𝗨𝗥 𝟴𝟯𝟱 𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻 committed by our donors, we’re not just funding climate action – we’re catalysing the systems change needed for a low-carbon future.

 Want to learn more? Visit mitigation-action.org
 Follow us here to stay updated on Calls for Projects, results, and new ideas in motion.

Name: Karlspreis
Description: The International Charlemagne Prize of Aachen is the oldest and best-known prize awarded for work done in the service of European unification.

Name: Beisheim Stiftung Schweiz
Description:
Die Beisheim Stiftung mit Sitz in Baar setzt sich dafür ein, dass jeder Mensch seine Potenziale entfalten und eine aktive Rolle in der Gemeinschaft wahrnehmen kann. Um dies zu erreichen, fördern und entwickeln wir Projekte in den Bereichen Bildung, Gesundheit, Kultur und Sport. 

Gemeinsam mit der namensgleichen deutschen Stiftung führen wir das philanthropische Erbe von Otto Beisheim fort. Partnerschaftliches Gestalten und wirkungsorientiertes Handeln prägen unsere Haltung.

Name: Stiftung Zollverein
Description:
UNESCO-Welterbe Zollverein: Bewahrung und Entwicklung in Essen
 "Die schönste Zeche der Welt": Übertägige Gebäude und Anlagen

 1,7 Mio. Besucher jährlich: Größte Touristenattraktion im Ruhrgebiet
 Kreativ- und Innovationswirtschaft: Ein wachsender Wirtschaftsstandort

Name: Prototype Fund
Description:
Der Prototype Fund ist ein Förderprogramm des Bundesministeriums für Technologie, Forschung und Raumfahrt (BMTFR), das von der Open Knowledge Foundation Deutschland betreut und ausgewertet wird.
Einzelpersonen und kleine Teams erhalten im Rahmen des Prototype Funds über sechs, bzw. zehn Monate hinweg finanzielle und ideelle Unterstützung für die Erprobung von Ideen und die Entwicklung von Open-Source-Software mit gesellschaftlichem Mehrwert in den Bereichen IT-Sicherheit und Software–Infrastruktur.
Seit 2016 konnten so fast 400 Projekte gefördert werden.

Name: DreamTeam by EDUCA SWISS
Description:
Die Herausforderung
Für zu viele Kinder in der Schweiz sind Chancen- und Bildungsgerechtigkeit nahezu unerreichbar. Bereits im Primarschulalter sehen sie sich mit scheinbar unüberwindbaren Hürden konfrontiert, die ihnen durch äussere Faktoren in den Weg gelegt werden. Dies erschwert eine günstige und förderliche Entwicklung ihrer Persönlichkeit. Schlummernde Interessen und Talente bleiben unentdeckt, wichtiges Selbstvertrauen bleibt auf der Strecke. Für die betroffenen Kinder kann dies lebenslange negative Folgen haben.

Unsere Lösung!
Das Mittel dagegen ist einfach und wirksam: Den betroffenen Kindern Zeit, Zuwendung und Aufmerksamkeit schenken, um sie so positiv in ihrer persönlichen Entwicklung zu fördern. Das ist die Aufgabe von DreamTeam. 

Das Mentoringprogramm DreamTeam fördert Primarschulkinder im ausserschulischen Bereich. Junge, engagierte Menschen (Mentor:Innen) übernehmen ehrenamtlich mindestens ein Jahr lang eine individuelle Patenschaft für ein Kind. Sie helfen ihm durch persönliche Zugewandtheit und aktive Freizeitgestaltung, sich zu entwickeln und zu lernen, wie die Herausforderungen des Alltags erfolgreich gemeistert werden können. DreamTeam fördert Chancengerechtigkeit, indem bei Kindern Lern- und Lebensfreude vermittelt, positive Impulse für die Entwicklung ihrer Persönlichkeit gesetzt und die Grundlagen für ein selbstbestimmtes Leben geschaffen werden.

Mentees (Primarschulkinder)
Das Programm richtet sich an Kinder im Primarschulalter (6-10 Jahre), die aus verschiedenen Gründen mehr individuelle Aufmerksamkeit durch eine weitere Bezugsperson brauchen. Mit ihr gehen sie auf Entdeckungsreise und wachsen über sich hinaus! 

Mentor:innen (Schüler:innen bzw. Student:innen)
DreamTeam bietet Schüler:innen bzw. Student:innen (16-30 Jahre) eine attraktive Möglichkeit, den Erwerb von Schlüsselkompetenzen mit gesellschaftlichem Engagement zu verbinden. Die Mentor:innen werden durch eine Fachperson eng begleitet und gecoacht.

Name: Domäne Capital L.P.
Description: Domäne Capital L.P. is a strategically positioned fund, dedicated to capitalizing on high-growth and sustainable investment opportunities in Latin America.

Name: Umweltstiftung Weser Ems
Description:
Die Umweltstiftung Weser-Ems ist eine private und unabhängige Stiftung für den Schutz von Natur und Umwelt im Raum Weser-Ems. Sie geht zurück auf die Initiative von Gertrud und Werner Brunken im Jahr 1989.

Wir fördern den Arten- und Biotopschutz, Wissenschaft und Forschung sowie besonders die Umweltbildung junger Menschen in der Region Weser-Ems.

Jeder kann eine Förderung beantragen – zum Beispiel Verbände oder Vereine, Privatpersonen, Firmen oder Schulen. Zweimal jährlich werden Fördergelder ausgeschüttet. Es ist keine große Bürokratie erforderlich.

Name: QuantumLeaks Foundation
Description:
The foundation's vision is to enlighten the phenomenon of quantum entanglement in collaboration with two scientific giants, the Max Planck Society and Alexander von Humboldt Foundation.

The QuantumLeaks Foundation is a non-profit science trust foundation established in June 2023, jointly with the Max Planck Foundation. The collaboration also involves the Humboldt Foundation with respect to funding and submission evaluation.

Name: Metaworld Fund
Description: Metaworld Fund is a multi-strategy quant-fund outperforming Bitcoin by design. It got awarded #1 performance 2024 by BarclayHedge.

Name: Anni Hofmann Stiftung
Description: Die Anni Hofmann Stiftung unterstützt ausschließlich die medizinische Forschung an Glioblastomen. Sie hat sich dabei zum Ziel gesetzt, diese körpereigenen Abwehrkräfte in ihrem Zusammenwirken zu erforschen, um diese zu regenerieren und zu stabilisieren.

Name: HELIOS FIDUCIE CAPITAL
Description:
Hélios Fiducie Capital est une société de conseil, opérationnelle, active en France et à l'étranger, dans le développement de projets privés et/ou publics.
La société promeut tout particulièrement  la fiducie-sûreté et la fiducie-gestion; recherche, structure et met en oeuvre des financements classiques et structurés; conseille et participe au développement économique de projets immobiliers, industriels et commerciaux de toute nature.
La société délivre des conseils et produit des solutions "sur mesure"; planifie et pilote des partenariats; accompagne ses clients dans la mise en oeuvre des structures recommandées.
Au besoin, la société prend des participations dans les sociétés et projets de ses clients.

Name: BE SHIRO Foundation
Description:
Wir ermöglichen Menschen,
ihre einzigartigen Potenziale zu entdecken & mit Freude zu realisieren.

Für ein glückliches & selbstbestimmtes Leben
mit positiver Wirkung für Gesellschaft, Tier und Natur.

Im Mai 2024 legt Andreas gemeinsam mit dem mehrfachen Ski-Weltmeister  Daniel Albrecht und dem Unternehmer Philipp Schmidt mit der Gründung der beshiro foundation den Grundstein für die Realisierung eines grossen Traumes – Millionen von Menschen weltweit zu ermöglichen, ihr einzigartiges Potenzial mit Leichtigkeit und Freude zu realisieren.

Name: Kultursekretariat NRW Gütersloh
Description: Das Kultursekretariat NRW Gütersloh (KSNRWGT) initiiert, fördert und begleitet Projekte in allen Kultursparten. Gemeinsam mit über 80 Mitgliedsstädten, mit dem Landschaftsverband Westfalen-Lippe und dem Landesverband Lippe sorgt das KSNRWGT mit Sitz in Gütersloh seit über 40 Jahren für die Förderung hochwertiger Kulturangebote in seinen Mitgliedsstädten – mit dem Ziel, in enger Kooperation mit dem Land Nordrhein-Westfalen die kommunale Kulturarbeit im Städte-Netzwerk zu qualifizieren. „Räume schaffen. Impulse setzen. Ideen fördern“ – so lautet der Slogan, mit dem das KSNRWGT Kulturpartner*innen miteinander vernetzt, sie zum Austausch, Wissenstransfer und kulturpolitischen Diskursen einlädt.

Name: VIVA Trust
Description: Promote more sustainable development in Latin America through the long-term creation of economic, ecological, human and social capital.

Name: The Tambwekar Foundation
Description: The Foundation will leverage the passion, competencies, and heritage of the Tambwekar Family members and our collaborators to make a positive difference in society and shape a better tomorrow. We look forward to continuing to build the Foundation in the long-term spirit of the Tambwekar family.

Name: Hans Erich und Marie Elfriede Dotter-Stiftung
Description: Hans Erich und Marie Elfriede Dotter-Stiftung is a company based out of Zerninstr. 10, Darmstadt, Germany.

Name: Verus Capital Investments
Description:
Verus Capital is a private real estate debt fund focused on delivering secure, income-generating opportunities for accredited investors. We provide short-term bridge financing on cash-flowing residential and commercial properties nationwide, targeting strong collateral, conservative loan-to-value ratios, and experienced borrowers.

At Verus Capital, we combine institutional-level underwriting with entrepreneurial agility, offering investors a reliable way to generate passive income without the challenges of owning and managing properties directly.

Name: Horizon Fiduciaire
Description: Established in 2021, Horizon Fiduciaire is an independent fiduciary firm based in Luxembourg, providing a comprehensive range of accounting and administrative services. We currently serve around 50 clients, including SMEs, holding companies, and independent professionals. Our services encompass accounting, tax compliance, company domiciliation, corporate secretarial support, payroll management, and full HR services. Our personalized approach and commitment to quality make us a trusted partner for our clients.

Name: Butter Fund & Co.
Description: We are a collective of investment leaders committed to driving positive change by backing innovative companies that merge profitability with purpose. Our focus spans diverse asset classes, allowing us to uncover and support ventures that prioritise social impact alongside financial success.

Name: FONDS DE DOTATION ART-CULTURE-FRANCE-CHINE-INTERNATIONAL
Description: Branche financière de Association Pour le développement des échanges France Chine(ADEFC)

Name: Occidental Rock Capital Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Occidental Rock Capital was established in 2019 and headquartered in the internationally recongised hub of Singapore. It has grown steadily and acquired the Registered Fund Management License in 2020. In 2021, Occidental Rock officially launched its assets and investment portfolio globally.

Occidental Rock Capital is a fund management company founded by its CEO Liu Haiyue, with the support of senior directors in finance, law, and related industries. Based on the team's expansive global investment experience, strict risk analysis system, and steady business operation model, the company delivers global multi-asset allocation within Singapore's mature financial infrastructure as well as its stable investment environment.

Name: Stiftung Kimongo-Hilfe
Description:
Entwicklungshilfe mit dem vollen Franken.
Wir bewegen Kimongo

Die Stiftung unterstützt und fördert die bildungsmässige, soziale und agrarwirtschaftliche Entwicklung sowie den Ausbau der dazu nötigen Infrastruktur im Bezirk Kimongo (District Bas-Fleuve) der Demokratischen Republik Kongo. Die Stiftung Kimongo-Hilfe ist eine offiziell eingetragene Stiftung. Aufsichtsbehörde Eidg. Departement des Innern (EDI)

Name: Sisserou Trading DMCC
Description:
Sisserou Trading DMCC: Leading Private Analyst and Trader Driving Profitable Investments

Sisserou Trading DMCC is a distinguished financial firm renowned for its expertise in private analysis and trading. With an unwavering commitment to excellence, we specialize in delivering superior financial analysis, executing highly profitable trades, and skillfully managing portfolios. 

Backed by a proven track record, our team possesses a keen ability to identify lucrative investment opportunities, resulting in maximized returns for our valued clients. We have established ourselves as trusted advisors, consistently delivering outstanding results while effectively managing risk.

At Sisserou Trading DMCC, we excel in navigating the intricate landscape of stocks, bonds, options, and derivatives, enabling us to leverage a diverse range of financial instruments. Our extensive knowledge and mastery of these markets empower us to make informed decisions, leading to favorable outcomes for our clients.

We pride ourselves not only on our technical proficiency but also on our exceptional communication and interpersonal skills. By fostering strong client relationships, we ensure a deep understanding of their unique financial goals and tailor our strategies accordingly. Our commitment to open and transparent communication guarantees that our clients are informed every step of the way.

With Sisserou Trading DMCC, you gain a partner dedicated to your financial success. Join us today and experience the confidence of working with a highly-skilled, professional team committed to unlocking the full potential of your investments.

Name: Pontiro fond
Description:
Vaše peníze si zaslouží víc. Ne průměr.
Pontiro fond – pro kvalifikované investory s ambicí zařadit se mezi TOP 3 nejvýnosnější nemovitostní fondy.

Name: Z Meditation Centre
Description:
Find Inner Peace and Joy at Z Meditation Center, Dharamshala, Himachal Pradesh!

Are you feeling overwhelmed and tired of dealing with everyday stress? At Z Meditation Center, we offer a one-week residential meditation course that teaches you how to achieve deep inner joy. By taking this course, you'll learn how to relax and focus your mind while also reducing stress, improving energy levels, and boosting your overall well-being. Our course has been praised by over 10,000 students for its easy-to-follow format and accessible explanations. Give yourself the gift of peace of mind.

Name: Linsenhoff Foundation
Description:
The Linsenhoff Foundation supports initiatives, especially in Germany, that provide educational opportunities for disadvantaged children, young people, and women. 

We are committed to the integration of people with refugee and migrant backgrounds. We are convinced that this is more important for our society than ever before. We prioritize supporting girls and young women.

With your help, we can achieve more! We appreciate every donation!

Yours sincerely 
Ann Kathrin Linsenhoff & Liselott Marie Linsenhoff

Name: Heinrich-Kalkhoff-Stiftung
Description: Die Heinrich Kalkhoff Stiftung wurde im Jahr 2001 von den Söhnen Berthold † und Heinz Kalkhoff † zur Erinnerung an ihren Vater Heinrich Kalkhoff gegründet. Diese Stiftung wurde ins Leben gerufen, um das Vermächtnis ihres Vaters fortzuführen und seinen Beitrag zur Gesellschaft zu würdigen. Heinrich Kalkhoff war ein erfolgreicher Unternehmer, der im Jahre 1919 die Fahrradmarke Kalkhoff gründete. Sein Wirken und Schaffen war geprägt von einem klaren Motto: "Erfolg ist selten eine Frage des Glücks". Basierend auf diesem Grundsatz legten die Gründer bei der Gründung der Stiftung fest, dass ihre Erträge hauptsächlich der Förderung von Jugendlichen im Ausbildungsbereich, der Unterstützung wissenschaftlicher Projekte wie "Jugend forscht" und der finanziellen Unterstützung von Institutionen, die ausschließlich caritative und mildtätige Zwecke verfolgen, zugutekommen sollen.

Name: Klimaat Kapitaal
Description: Ons fonds investeert in duurzame producten die CO2 uitstoot terugdringen en waarmee gebruikers er direct financieel op vooruit gaan. Zo dragen we bij aan een schone en rechtvaardige wereld.

Name: The Authenticity Fund
Description: This is the second venture fund of Tampa-based SCP & CO (https://scpandco.com/), with over 20+ years’ experience and a top-decile track record.  The Authenticity Fund (TAF) is an early-stage venture capital fund created to invest in emerging cybersecurity companies that seek to fortify digital trust against artificial intelligence (AI) and advanced automation.  TAF’s goal is to invest in those companies poised to benefit from the growing demand for new capabilities that provide protection, by strengthening digital trust, from the growing sophistication of threats created by rapidly advancing artificial intelligence (AI) and advanced automation capabilities in the hands of bad actors.

Name: Stichting Fonds Welzijnswerk
Description: Ons fonds beoogt een financiële bijdrage te leveren aan projecten en organisaties met als doelstelling het welzijn van jeugdigen te bevorderen. Als uw organisatie denkt in aanmerking te komen voor ondersteuning, raden wij u aan eerst goed de website door te nemen. U kunt dan zelf inschatten of u op de mogelijke steun van het fonds kunt rekenen.

Name: JaBe-Stiftung für Kinder & Jugendliche
Description:
Die JaBe-Stiftung für Kinder & Jugendliche ist eine gemeinnützige Stiftung öffentlichen Rechts mit Sitz in Köln. Wir unterstützen gemeinnützige Jugendeinrichtungen und Projekte, um Kindern und Jugendlichen aus sozial schwachen Verhältnissen, unabhängig von ihrer Herkunft, Grundlagen für eine bessere Zukunft zu bieten. Dabei sind die Menschen und der Austausch das Wichtigste, weshalb wir regional verbunden agieren.

Name: Propertunity LTD
Description: Propertunity is a real estate private equity firm focused on value-add investing in transitional and generational real estate across the major property types and markets throughout the United States. Name: Grant Wise Strategies
Description:
At Grant Wise Strategies, we specialize in turning aspirations into opportunities by providing end-to-end grant solutions for USA residents. Our mission is to simplify the complex world of grants, making funding accessible to individuals, nonprofits, small businesses, and organizations striving to make a difference.

What We Do:

Grant Research: We identify the perfect funding opportunities tailored to your goals, saving you time and effort.

Grant Writing: Our expert team crafts compelling, professional, and winning grant applications that stand out.

Comprehensive Support: From application guidance to compliance and reporting, we handle every step of the grant process.

Who We Serve:

Nonprofits seeking funding for community projects, education, or social causes.

Small Businesses looking for grants to grow, innovate, or recover.

Researchers and Innovators in need of funding for groundbreaking projects.

Individuals pursuing personal or professional development opportunities.

If you’re looking for a partner to navigate the competitive world of grants, we’re here to help you succeed. Let’s turn your vision into reality

Name: Al Mustafa Trust Pakistan
Description:
Al Mustafa Trust (AMT) is a registered non-profit, non-governmental, and non-political organization dedicated to humanitarian service, social welfare, and community development. Since its inception, AMT has been working tirelessly to improve lives through sustainable initiatives focused on healthcare, education, poverty alleviation, disaster relief, women empowerment, and orphan care.

With a strong commitment to human dignity and social justice, AMT has served thousands of underprivileged families across Pakistan and abroad. Our programs include free medical camps, hospitals, vocational training, scholarships, clean water projects, and emergency relief operations for communities affected by natural disasters and crises.

At Al Mustafa Trust, we believe in transparency, accountability, and impact-driven projects. By partnering with global donors, corporate partners, and volunteers, we aim to create lasting change and empower individuals to live healthier, safer, and more dignified lives.

 Our Focus Areas:

Healthcare Access & Free Medical Services

Education Support & Scholarships

Disaster Relief & Rehabilitation

Orphan Sponsorship & Child Welfare

Women Empowerment & Skill Development

Water, Sanitation & Hygiene (WASH) Projects

 Join us in making a difference. Whether you’re an individual, corporate partner, or volunteer, your support helps us reach more lives and build a better tomorrow.

Al Mustafa Trust – Serving Humanity with Compassion and Commitment.

Name: Denarius Fund
Description:
Welcome to Denarius Fund, where sophisticated trading meets prudent risk management.

Specializing in Contracts for Difference (CFDs) in the Forex market, our fund leverages proprietary trading programs to navigate this dynamic environment. Our investment ethos is built around capital appreciation, preservation of capital, and diversification. We employ proprietary algorithms, fine-tuned by experienced traders, for active market engagement.

Risk management is central to our strategy, focusing on strict controls and diversified portfolios to mitigate potential losses. At Denarius Fund, we blend innovative trading strategies with disciplined risk management, aiming for optimal performance and capital protection.

Name: Motif Music Fund
Description:
Motif Music Fund is the world's first dedicated dance music investment fund. Based in Amsterdam, the capital of dance, and established by industry professionals deeply rooted in the dance industry, Motif is the first genre-focused music investment fund, dedicated to dance music artists and songwriters. It is our mission to represent artists and songwriters, safeguarding their legacy by actively managing their catalogues.

We gained experience from decades with leading record labels, publishers, music streaming platforms, and dance music event promotors. Our avid focus on dance music stems from owning and organising leading festival brands such as DGTL, Amsterdam Open Air, and Gardens of Babylon, but also from an innate individual love for dance music.

Check out our website if you are an artist, producer or songwriter interested in talking to us!

www.motifmusicfund.com

Through proactive actions and programs of kindness, we aim to make a long-term impact and

Name: Skypeak Partners
Description:
Skypeak Partners has extensive experience in opportunistic growth debt and equity investments across diverse industries and geographies.

Our management team aims to identify investment targets in both the public and private markets that have the potential to become leaders in their respective industries.

Name: Gateway Foundation
Description: Gateway Foundation strives to enrich St. Louis life and culture by supporting efforts to acquire, create and improve tangible and durable art and urban design. The focus of Gateway Foundation is to foster and support cultural and artistic activities devoted to improving the quality of life for residents of the St. Louis Metropolitan Area. Towards this end, we prioritize projects involving the acquisition, creation or improvement of items of a durable, physical nature.

Name: Eden Sustainability Fund, LLC
Description:
The principal objective of the fund is to generate positive absolute returns to its Partners by making mezzanine loans to privately held companies with underlying sustainable projects and utilizing other financial instruments as determined by the investment manager in its sole discretion.

Specifically, the Fund will be providing capital to pre-development & full development investments in environmentally sustainable assets (i.e., renewable technologies, decarbonization projects and climate technologies (Renewables and Climate Tech) that create high and well balanced risk adjusted returns while helping mitigate climate change. The Fund intends to invest in select renewable and climate tech assets outlined by the Inflation Reduction Act( the "IRA")* and any technology that facilitates the creation or selling of climate related credits and certificates, such as: Investment Tax Credits, Carbon Credits, Water Credits, REC's, RIN's, and the like. The Fund intends to have its loans paid back to the Fund within 24 months or less of deployment. Approved Inflation Reduction Act asset classes: Renewable Energy Production (Solar, Wind, Geothermal, Hydrogen), EV Charging Stations, Carbon Sequestration, Waste to Energy Recovery, Biogas Production, Micro-grid Production, and Energy Storage.

Name: Förderverein der Montessori-Schule Idstein e.V.
Description: Der Förderverein fördert unterrichtliche und außerunterrichtliche Aktivitäten der Schule, die nicht über den Haushaltsplan der Schule abgedeckt werden können, aber für den pädagogischen Auftrag der Schule notwendig sind. Wir stellen Kontakte zwischen Schülerinnen und Schüler, Lernbegleitenden, Verwaltung, Leitung, Land und Kommune her. Die Montessori-Schule Idstein ist eine Grund- und Integrierte Gesamt-Schule, die nach den Grundsätzen der Reformpädagogik von Maria Montessori Schülerinnen und Schüler von Klasse 1 bis 10 begleitet.

Name: Stiftung Lebensraum Gebirge
Description:
Die Stiftung Lebensraum Gebirge wurde 1995 gegründet und ist im Herrenhaus Grafenort angesiedelt, welches im Besitz des Benediktinerklosters Engelberg ist. Die Stiftung bietet einen Begegnungs- und Bildungsort zum Thema «Lebensraum Gebirge» und organisiert Veranstaltungen, Konzerte, Schulungen, Tagungen, Ausstellungen und vieles mehr.

Ausserdem setzt sie sich für die Wiederherstellung, Erhaltung und Pflege naturnaher Kulturlandschaften im Berggebiet ein sowie den Erhalt des Herrenhauses als ein Ort für persönliche, kulturelle und wissenschaftliche Begegnungen im Engelberger Tal.

Name: StichtingTegenZinloosGeweld
Description: De Landelijke StichtingTegenZinloosGeweld initieert, stimuleert en ondersteunt initiatieven voor verbetering van de woon-, werk- en leefomgeving en streeft naar een samenleving waarin iedereen zich bewust is van de oorzaken en gevolgen van pesten en [zinloos] geweld.

Name: Kinderturnstiftung Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Die Kinderturnstiftung Baden-Württemberg setzt sich dafür ein, dass jedes Kind in Baden-Württemberg die Chance auf ausreichende Bewegung und ein gesundes Aufwachsen erhält – unabhängig von Herkunft, Geschlecht oder sozialem Status.

Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2007 verfolgen wir das Ziel, die Bewegungsförderung von Kindern im Alter von null bis zehn Jahren nachhaltig zu stärken. In Kooperation mit Partnern aus Gesellschaft, Bildung, Politik und Wirtschaft entwickeln wir landesweite Programme, fördern Projekte vor Ort und schaffen Strukturen, die Kinder in Bewegung bringen – vom Elementarbereich über die Grundschule bis in den Freizeitbereich.

Unsere Handlungsfelder:

Frühkindliche Bewegungsförderung

Bewegungsfreundliche Lebenswelten

Qualifizierung & Netzwerkaufbau

Forschung & Wissenstransfer

Wir sind überzeugt: Wer sich von klein auf ausreichend bewegt, entwickelt körperliche, geistige und soziale Kompetenzen, die ein Leben lang tragen. Dafür engagieren wir uns mit Leidenschaft, Expertise und einem starken Netzwerk.

Name: Kandzeras Foundation
Description: Kandzeras Foundation is a private philanthropic fund dedicated to turning human potential into reality through entrepreneurship. The foundation supports social projects and initiatives that empower individuals and teams to embrace an entrepreneurial mindset—not only through funding, but by actively participating in their strategic development.

Name: PearlBridge Capital Managers
Description:
PearlBridge Capital Managers Ltd is a women-led Sub-Saharan-focused fund management company located in Lagos, Nigeria. Formerly operating under PearlMutual Consulting Ltd, we use our knowledge, expertise, and established contacts to raise capital for businesses through impact-driven private debt funds.

BRIDGEANGELS FUND I (existing fund)
In 2018, We launched an open-ended retail fund that sources funding from high-net-worth individuals to fulfill the short-term working capital needs of SMEs in Nigeria. This vehicle, otherwise known as BridgeAngels Fund I, has since provided 12 SMEs in the Agric processing and manufacturing industry with over $3.2 million in funding.

WOMEN AND YOUTH IMPACT FUND INVESTMENT STRATEGY (upcoming fund)
To address the finance gap in Sub-Saharan Africa, PearlBridge Capital Managers will launch a gender-smart, close-ended fund with an overall target size of $30,000,000. The primary aim of this fund will be to improve funding access to SMEs that are led by women or provide financial liberation to the youth and/or women. This fund will be a hybrid of debt and equity financing allowing the investees the ability to convert their debt to equity. 

CONTACT US:

Our mission is twofold: first, we strive to provide capital to companies with demonstrable potential within these sectors, with a view to sustainable growth and innovation. Secondly, we have a special interest in companies that involve multicultural founders or whose products and services are aimed at multicultural target groups. We strongly believe in the power of diversity and inclusion and see this as a key driving force behind successful businesses in today's global economy.

We are proud of our strategic investments and partnerships and are convinced that they make a significant contribution to both economic growth and social diversity. We are at your disposal at any time for further information and discussion of possible collaborations.

Name: JAKA Stiftung
Description:
Wir bezwecken die Unterstützung und Förderung von Institutionen und von Personen in der Forschung, Fortbildung, Prävention, bei der Früherfassung und Heilung von Krebs- und Herzkrankheiten.

Im Weiteren können wir Beiträge an Personen mit solchen Erkrankungen ausrichten. Wir können auch Unterstützung erbringen für Behandlungs- und Pflegekosten sowie Therapieformen und solchen -einrichtungen. Generell können wir Leistungen erbringen, die dem Wohl solcher Betroffenen dienen. Wir können auch finanzielle Beiträge an andere Organisationen leisten, welche gleichartige Ziele verfolgen.

Die JAKA Stiftung ist im Rahmen der Zwecksetzung in der Schweiz und im Ausland tätig. Sie hat keinen Erwerbszweck und erstrebt keinen Gewinn.

Name: Huckfeldt-Weber Kinderstiftung
Description:
Die Huckfeldt-Weber Kinderstiftung setzt sich für eine bessere medizinische Zukunft von Kindern und Jugendlichen ein. Unser Ziel ist es, die Kindermedizin am Universitätsklinikum Hamburg-Eppendorf (UKE) nachhaltig zu stärken durch die gezielte Förderung von Forschung, Lehre und Krankenversorgung.

Wir glauben an die Kraft wissenschaftlicher Innovation, an die Bedeutung einer exzellenten Ausbildung und an die Notwendigkeit einer kindgerechten, ganzheitlichen Betreuung. Mit unserem Engagement tragen wir dazu bei, jungen Patient:innen neue Perspektiven zu eröffnen, die kompetent, menschlich und zukunftsorientiert sind.

Wir sind eine Treuhandstiftung der Stiftung zur Förderung der Universitätsmedizin Hamburg-Eppendorf (UKE-Stiftung).

Name: Zeitbild Stiftung
Description: Die Zeitbild Stiftung - Eine operative Stiftung mit Projekten im Bereich Bildung, Politik, Gesundheit, Soziales, Umwelt und mehr!

Name: Heinrich-Dammann-Stiftung
Description: Die Heinrich-Dammann-Stiftung wurde von Heinrich und Ortrud Dammann in Söhlde gegründet. Heinrich Dammann starb 2013 in Hildesheim im Alter von 88 Jahren, seine Frau Ortrud mit 90 Jahren im Jahr darauf. Am Ende ihres Lebens entschieden sie sich, auch ihren Nachlass in die Stiftung zu übertragen. Die Stiftung gehört damit zu den größten kirchlichen Stiftungen in Deutschland. Sie fördert die Arbeit mit Jugendlichen in Niedersachsen. Insbesondere kirchliche Jugendarbeit in der Ev.-luth. Landeskirche Hannovers und Jugendarbeit in den Bereichen Kunst, Kultur, Bildung und Sport. Bei der Förderung wird ein besonderer Fokus auf Partizipation Jugendlicher, die Vernetzung der Träger von Jugendarbeit und die Entwicklung zukunftsweisender Jugendarbeit auf dem Land gelegt.

Name: dare Stiftung
Description:
Unser Anliegen ist die Qualifizierung und Weiterentwicklung von Angeboten der Jugendhilfe für Kinder und Jugendliche, die wegen Traumatisierung, seelischem Leiden oder Kinderschutz fremd untergebracht sind. 
Die dare Stiftung initiiert, koordiniert und fördert Projekte und Hilfsaktionen, die beispielsweise Bewegungs- und Bildungsangebote verknüpfen oder Integration durch Sportsozialarbeit anbieten.

Name: Knightsbridge Capital Partners (KNBCP)
Description:
We provide private equity investment solutions for sophisticated investors, HNW & UHNW individuals and family offices.

Our investment mandate is clear and consistent:

Strong fundamentals

Superior investment returns
A clear exit strategy

With over 30 years combined experience in the investment world, our global reach uncovers opportunities and our stringent due diligence process ensures our investors are in safe hands.

It doesn't stop there however...

Providing education and ongoing CPD for our investors is something we're passionate about, both for their understanding as well as to maximise their ongoing investment journey with us.

Corporate Social Responsibility is the final piece of the jigsaw. We believe that as our ecosystem benefits, so too should those charitable organisations that are closest to ours and our investors hearts.

Name: AIOX APEX ANGEL FUND
Description: AIOX Innovation Fund is committed to investing in leading and innovative international companies in the fields of technology, Internet, consumption, medical care, real estate and financial services. The objective of the fund is to achieve long-term capital appreciation and create maximum value for investors. As the cornerstone of AIOX, the success of the fund is inseparable from a strong investment team and deep industry resources.

Name: Bürgerstiftung Schaumburg
Description:
Die Bürgerstiftung Schaumburg wurde 2004 mit einem Startkapital von rund 250.000 Euro „von Bürgern für Bürger“ ins Leben gerufen.
Ziel der Stiftung ist es, das soziale und kulturelle Leben im Schaumburger Land nachhaltig zu fördern. Heute verfügt die Stiftung, auch durch die Einbindung von sieben Treuhandstiftungen, über ein Vermögen von fast 6 Millionen Euro. Mit dieser soliden Basis unterstützt die Bürgerstiftung vielfältige Projekte, die das Miteinander in der Region stärken. Besonderen Wert legt sie auf die Förderung von Bildung, Kultur und sozialem Engagement

Name: Millennium Businesses
Description:
Welcome to Millennium Businesses, a dynamic portfolio of companies where dedication to integrity, a commitment to building an enduring legacy, and a passion for innovative business practices converge. Our collective experience spans over a century across the industries we operate in, and yet, we are only just beginning. We're not just pioneers; we're architects of the next era. Fueled by an unwavering belief in our values, we are laying a foundation that transcends time, leaving an indelible impact on all those involved.
 
We invite you to be a part of this grand story in the making, where potential is realized, and fulfillment is achieved.

Name: THE ITALIAN BEAUTY INVESTMENT FUND (FIBIT) RAIF V.C.I.C. PLC
Description:
The Italian Beauty Investment Fund was born to create an act of love, initially towards the city of Como, with plans to be replicated throughout our beloved Italy and beyond.

We have grasped the need to redevelop parts of the city by creating the idea of a  modern living context, a new way of thinking and seeing the urban reality that surrounds us, imagining innovative and ideal ways of existing.

A new way of thinking about real estate recovery, a new way of seeing the city and its context, a new way of thinking about places of interaction. Our projects recreate an experience of living, in places where you can live by breathing in the history and culture of the place. With a new modern spirit.

Often History, whose analysis is like a beacon in the dark, is ignored or forgotten or, as unfortunately too often happens, some rewrite it at will and convenience.

Fortunately,  humans, in the course of every age, have felt the vibrant need to leave indelible traces of their time and accomplishments. They have, thus, built monuments, elevated cathedrals, transmitted culture, art, science. Through these symbols, and traditions, testimony of the past may accrue to the benefit of future generations.

Our redevelopments aim, with the right ethical and social sense, to preserve, aggregating and growing together.

Name: Best Samaritan Blood Donation Foundation
Description: Best Samaritan, a destination for people who care for each other, is the outcome of real-life challenges faced by the Co-Founder Michael Nirmal. In his expansive career across educational institutions, he frequently confronted the need of sudden blood donations by the students for their friends and relatives and realized how important it is to connect the donors to the needy people through a convenient and accessible platform. Likewise, he also witnessed people struggling for quality nursing care at home that is affordable and safe. These needs led to the foundation of Best Samaritan by a group of like-minded people, who are working aggressively to connect the needy people to blood donors and care providers in a hassle-free manner through this platform.

Franziskus-Stiftung - Jugendwerk der Franziskaner
